folios.text:
In disem czu̇sten. Mein herrn graff albrecht vo
umgalt
her ludwig lantgraff von hirstenberg
her graff von benemberg
her graff bernhart von regenstein
her graff gottfrid von hahenloch
her graff hant von mansfelt
her graff ludwig von peneburg
her gotthalt von steffa. bedpanczt
her hant von turingen
her Bappamein
her suppen von stein. waz warkhen Ritter
her lug von rotenhan
her von waldenfels
her hynbrand von thungen
her gregor von blechen
her genin quast
